metadata.description: Training dataset for an AI chatbot covering events, training, contacts, and career transition pathways across Accenture industry groups and capability areas.
chatbot_use_cases: Retrieve upcoming open events filtered by industry, capability, or type
Recommend training courses for capability transitions
Identify contacts who have made specific industry or capability transitions
Draft outreach messages to community leads or transition contacts

training.title: Cyber Security Fundamentals
training.description: An introductory course covering core principles of Cyber Security - threat types, security controls, risk management and compliance basics.

training.title: Cloud Computing Essentials
training.description: Covers fundamentals of cloud computing including service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), deployment models, key providers (AWS, Azure, GCP) and common use cases.

training.title: Cyber Risk & Compliance Foundations
training.description: Explores regulatory frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, GDPR), risk assessment methodologies and compliance management. Ideal for those transitioning into Cyber Risk roles.

training.title: Identity & Access Management (IAM) Fundamentals
training.description: Introduction to IAM concepts including authentication, authorisation, SSO, MFA and privileged access management across enterprise environments.

training.title: Introduction to DevSecOps
training.description: Explore the principles of integrating security into DevOps pipelines. Covers CI/CD, SAST, DAST, container security and shift-left security practices.

training.title: Data Analytics Fundamentals
training.description: An introduction to data analytics covering data types, descriptive statistics, basic visualisation, Excel/SQL basics and interpretation of data outputs.

training.title: Python for Data Science
training.description: Practical Python programming for data tasks - data manipulation with Pandas, visualisation with Matplotlib and an introduction to machine learning with Scikit-learn.

training.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Prep
training.description: Structured preparation for the AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner exam. Covers AWS core services, pricing, architecture, security and the Well-Architected Framework.

training.title: Digital Engineering: Agile & Scrum Fundamentals
training.description: Introduction to Agile methodologies and Scrum. Covers sprint planning, backlog management, retrospectives and working in cross-functional teams.

training.title: Financial Services Regulatory Overview
training.description: A broad overview of the regulatory landscape in Financial Services including FCA, PRA, Basel III, AML and how regulation shapes FS technology and risk decisions.

training.title: Health & Public Service Digital Transformation
training.description: Explores digital transformation in the public sector - NHS digital, government technology, digital identity and service design principles.

training.title: Responsible AI: Ethics & Governance
training.description: Covers AI ethics principles, algorithmic bias, governance frameworks, explainability and the EU AI Act. Recommended for all Data & AI practitioners.

training.title: Cloud Security Fundamentals
training.description: Explores security considerations specific to cloud environments - shared responsibility model, identity management, network security and encryption in the cloud.

training.title: Introduction to Kubernetes & Containerisation
training.description: Hands-on introduction to containerisation with Docker and orchestration with Kubernetes. Covers key concepts for cloud-native application deployment.

training.title: Storytelling with Data: Visualisation Best Practices
training.description: Teaches effective data storytelling using visualisation tools. Covers chart selection, dashboard design, colour theory and communicating insight to non-technical audiences.

training.title: Digital Engineering: API Design & REST Fundamentals
training.description: Practical introduction to RESTful API design, HTTP methods, authentication patterns and API documentation. Suitable for early-stage digital engineers.

training.title: Penetration Testing Foundations
training.description: Foundational course covering ethical hacking methodology, OWASP top 10, basic vulnerability scanning and the penetration testing lifecycle.

training.title: Products Industry: Consumer Goods & Retail Overview
training.description: An orientation to the Products industry covering consumer goods, retail, life sciences and agricultural sectors - key trends, client challenges and market dynamics.

training.title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
training.description: Practical training on provisioning and managing cloud infrastructure using Terraform. Covers HCL syntax, modules, state management and CI/CD integration.

training.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
training.description: Introduction to supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering and common ML algorithms. Practical exercises using Python and Scikit-learn.

contacts.name: Alex WellbeingLead
contacts.transition_story: Moved from Health & Public Service consulting into Digital Engineering after upskilling in Agile delivery and API development.

contacts.name: Alex InnovationLead
contacts.transition_story: Started career in Health & Public Service before transitioning into Communications, Media & Technology, focusing on media platform innovation.

contacts.name: Alex TechnologyLead
contacts.transition_story: Originally in HPS digital project delivery, transitioned into Cyber Security with a focus on healthcare data security and identity management.

contacts.name: Alex CyberLead
contacts.transition_story: Built career in Financial Services risk and compliance before specialising in Cyber Security, leading cross-industry security programmes.

contacts.name: Priya DataLead
contacts.transition_story: Began career in Financial Services data analytics before moving into the Products industry to lead consumer data and AI programmes.

contacts.name: James CloudLead
contacts.transition_story: Started in Resources industry IT operations before transitioning into Cloud & Infrastructure, now leading large-scale cloud migration programmes in Financial Services.

contacts.name: Omar DevSecLead
contacts.transition_story: Originally a software developer in CMT, shifted focus to DevSecOps after identifying a passion for secure pipeline design and platform engineering.

contacts.name: Sarah HPSLead
contacts.transition_story: Moved from the Products sector into Health & Public Service, bringing commercial industry experience to NHS and central government digital programmes.

contacts.name: Lena FSLead
contacts.transition_story: Spent early career in Resources sector data and analytics before transitioning to Financial Services, now leading data-driven client programmes.

contacts.name: Ben ResourcesLead
contacts.transition_story: Started in CMT infrastructure roles before pivoting to the Resources industry, focusing on energy sector digital transformation and cloud adoption.

contacts.name: Fatima ProductsLead
contacts.transition_story: Built a career in HPS data and policy analytics before transitioning into the Products sector to lead consumer intelligence and AI transformation programmes.

contacts.name: Nina InclusiveLead
contacts.transition_story: Transitioned from HPS delivery consulting into Financial Services, and took on an additional Inclusion & Diversity leadership role alongside her client work.

contacts.name: Alex EarlyCareerLead
contacts.transition_story: Joined via the graduate programme in CMT and later moved to Products, now leads the Early Careers community supporting graduates across all industry groups.

contacts.name: Raj DevSecTransition
contacts.transition_story: Moved from FS software delivery into DevSecOps, now supporting HPS clients with secure CI/CD pipeline delivery on public sector programmes.

contacts.name: Clara CloudTransition
contacts.transition_story: Former HPS infrastructure consultant who transitioned into Cloud Architecture, now delivering cloud-native solutions for Resources sector clients.

contacts.name: Tom DataMove
contacts.transition_story: Transitioned from a Resources industry operations analyst role into Data Engineering within the CMT industry group, specialising in data platform builds.

contacts.name: Mei CyberMove
contacts.transition_story: Started in Products sector technology consulting, moved into Financial Services where she built a Cyber Security specialism in fraud detection and IAM.

contacts.name: David DETransition
contacts.transition_story: Moved from a Financial Services business analyst background into Digital Engineering after completing self-paced coding and Agile certifications.

contacts.name: Anya HPSToProducts
contacts.transition_story: Spent four years in HPS on NHS digital programmes, then transitioned to the Products industry supporting FMCG clients on digital and data initiatives.

contacts.name: Leo CMTToFS
contacts.transition_story: Built data analytics skills in CMT media clients, then transitioned into Financial Services to focus on capital markets data and regulatory reporting.

career_transition_pathways.title: Health & Public Service → Cyber Security
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for employees in Health & Public Service who want to transition into Cyber Security roles.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Cyber as a Capability
pathway_steps.objective: Understand what Cyber Security roles involve and how they apply across industries.
recommended_actions: Attend open cyber or technology networking events
Review internal cyber community posts and role profiles

pathway_steps.title: Build Cyber Fundamentals
pathway_steps.objective: Gain baseline cyber knowledge suitable for career transition.
recommended_actions: Complete beginner cyber training
Focus on security fundamentals and terminology

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Cyber Practitioners
pathway_steps.objective: Learn from people already working in cyber roles and understand entry pathways.
recommended_actions: Reach out to cyber community leads
Request informal career conversations

pathway_steps.title: Choose an Entry Cyber Focus Area
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a cyber sub-area aligned to your interests and background.

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for cyber opportunities.
recommended_actions: Update skills profile with completed training
Discuss transition with your People Lead
Apply for internal cyber roles or shadowing opportunities

success_indicators: Participation in at least one cyber networking event
Career conversation with a cyber practitioner

career_transition_pathways.title: Financial Services → Data & AI
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for Financial Services employees who want to move into Data & AI roles, leveraging their existing analytical and regulatory knowledge.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Data & AI as a Capability
pathway_steps.objective: Understand what Data & AI roles look like and how financial services experience transfers.
recommended_actions: Attend open Data & AI networking events
Speak with colleagues already in Data & AI

pathway_steps.title: Build Data Foundations
pathway_steps.objective: Develop core data literacy and technical foundations.
recommended_actions: Complete data analytics fundamentals training
Learn Python basics for data work

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Data & AI Practitioners
pathway_steps.objective: Build your network in the Data & AI community and understand career routes.
recommended_actions: Attend the Data & AI Community Connect event
Request a career conversation with the Data & AI Lead

pathway_steps.title: Choose a Data & AI Specialism
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a specialism that aligns with your FS background.

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for Data & AI opportunities.
recommended_actions: Build a portfolio of data projects or case studies
Discuss internal mobility with your People Lead
Apply for Data & AI roles or cross-capability secondments

success_indicators: Completion of data analytics fundamentals training
Attendance at a Data & AI networking event
Career conversation with a Data & AI practitioner
Basic Python or SQL skills demonstrated

career_transition_pathways.title: Health & Public Service → Digital Engineering
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for HPS employees looking to build a career in Digital Engineering, drawing on their public sector delivery experience.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Digital Engineering
pathway_steps.objective: Understand the scope of Digital Engineering roles and how public sector experience transfers.
recommended_actions: Attend open Digital Engineering networking events
Review Digital Engineering community resources

pathway_steps.title: Build Digital Engineering Foundations
pathway_steps.objective: Gain foundational skills in Agile delivery and software engineering basics.
recommended_actions: Complete Agile & Scrum fundamentals training
Begin API design and REST fundamentals

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Digital Engineers
pathway_steps.objective: Build a network in Digital Engineering and understand entry roles.
recommended_actions: Attend the HPS to Digital Engineering transition panel
Reach out to Digital Engineering Community Leads

pathway_steps.title: Choose a Digital Engineering Specialism
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a DE sub-area suited to your background and interests.

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for Digital Engineering opportunities.
recommended_actions: Build a small coding or Agile portfolio
Discuss transition goals with your People Lead
Explore internal Digital Engineering roles and secondments

success_indicators: Completion of Agile or coding fundamentals training
Attendance at a Digital Engineering networking event
Career conversation with a Digital Engineering practitioner

career_transition_pathways.title: Financial Services → Cloud & Infrastructure
career_transition_pathways.description: A guided pathway for Financial Services employees who want to transition into Cloud & Infrastructure roles, leveraging their understanding of regulated, enterprise-scale environments.

pathway_steps.title: Explore Cloud & Infrastructure
pathway_steps.objective: Understand what Cloud & Infrastructure roles involve and how FS knowledge transfers.
recommended_actions: Attend the Cloud & Infrastructure Career Pathways Panel
Review the Cloud community resources and role profiles

pathway_steps.title: Build Cloud Foundations
pathway_steps.objective: Develop core cloud knowledge and technical literacy.
recommended_actions: Complete cloud computing essentials training
Begin AWS Cloud Practitioner preparation

pathway_steps.title: Connect with Cloud Practitioners
pathway_steps.objective: Learn from Cloud & Infrastructure practitioners and understand pathways into the capability.
recommended_actions: Join the Cloud Certification Study Group
Request a career conversation with the Cloud Practice Lead

pathway_steps.title: Choose a Cloud Specialism
pathway_steps.objective: Identify a cloud focus area that builds on your FS background.
focus_areas: Cloud Security & Compliance (relevant to FS regulation)

pathway_steps.title: Prepare for Role Transition
pathway_steps.objective: Position yourself for Cloud & Infrastructure opportunities.
recommended_actions: Obtain an AWS or Azure foundational certification
Discuss transition goals with your People Lead
Explore internal cloud roles, secondments or project opportunities

success_indicators: Attendance at a cloud networking or development event
Career conversation with a Cloud practitioner
